Localization.Description: A user deleted log entries, exported a log, or analyzed a log

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} exported the log on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} analyzed the log in Excel on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted log entries to entry ID {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
